/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING & MOTION TO SUPPRESS/X:PEOPLE'S WITNESS, SFPD OFFICER KEVIN ZHANG, HAVING BEEN PREVIOUSLY SWORN, RESUMES THE WITNESS STAND AND IS EXAMINED UNDER DIRECT EXAMINATION BY ADA, MICHAEL NGUYEN,/WIT SWORNDA:SFPD SGT, ANGUS CHAMBERS/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFFICER KEVIN DANIELI/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 3, PHOTO OF CADILLAC; PEOPLE'S 4, PHOTO OF DOOR WITH BROKEN GLASS; PEOPLE'S 5, PHOTO OF DOOR; PEOPLE'S 6, PHOTO OF BUTANE LIGHTER; PEOPLE'S7, PHOTO OF MR, VAUGHN; PEOPLE'S 8, INSIDE OF CAR WITH BOLT CUTTER; PEOPLE'S 9, PHOTO OF INSIDE OF VEHICLE; PEOPLE'S 10, PHOTO OF TRUNK WITH ITEMS; PEOPLE'S 11, PHOTO OF CIGARETTES AND BAG; DEFENSE A, PHOTO OF CUT ON RIGHT HAND/ /EXHM:DEFENSE B, SILVER THUMBDRIVE/ /X:NO EXHIBITS WERE MARKED 1 AND 2,/X:MOTION TO SUPPRESS IS DENIED,/X:DEFENSE ORAL 17B MOTION IS DENIED,/X:MOTION TO RELEASE ON OWN RECOGNIZANCE IS DENIED,/HTA1:1/871D:2/X:COUNTS3 AND 4 ARE CERTIFIED,/BAIL:10000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT/DOP/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
/CAL:INSTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT, PLEA AND COUNSEL/CON:PAM HERZIG/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX: 05-16-18/987,2/BAIL:10000/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 HOUR/DOP/
